mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0504_02-01#Sql001 */ COUNT(1) FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI WHERE 1 = 1 AND MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT TIPEA /* @SQLID=SUB0504_02-01#Sql002 */ USING ( SELECT #{req.butenCode} AS BUTEN_CODE, TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
TO_DATE(#{req.edelivAgreementDate}, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE,
NULL AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE,
#{req.edelivAgreementKbn} AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, #{req.userId} AS USER_ID FROM DUAL ) A ON ( TIPEA.BUTEN_CODE = A.BUTEN_CODE AND TIPEA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TIPEA.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE = A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, TIPEA.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN = A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, TIPEA.UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE(), TIPEA.UPDATE_USER = A.USER_ID, TIPEA.SYS_ID = 'SUB0504' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TIPEA.BUTEN_CODE, TIPEA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TIPEA.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, TIPEA.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, TIPEA.CREATE_TIME, TIPEA.CREATE_USER, TIPEA.UPDATE_TIME, TIPEA.UPDATE_USER, TIPEA.SYS_ID ) VALUES ( A.BUTEN_CODE, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE(), A.USER_ID, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE(), A.USER_ID, 'SUB0504' )
